examples: No one would dream of straightening out the church's knobbly spire.
Donald perches on a nearby tree and the mouth pointed in the direction of the spire.
You may be one of those guys who thinks there's nothing cooler than a superhero brooding on a rooftop or cathedral spire.
The elevator up the spire is manually operated and represents its progression in feet, not floors.
By contrast, a spire is something that is part of the building's architectural design.
